query:
ALTER TABLE users 
  ADD COLUMN passwordHash TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN resetToken VARCHAR(128) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN resetTokenExpiresAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN emailVerified BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE;
command:

  ADD COLUMN passwordHash TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN resetToken VARCHAR(128) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN resetTokenExpiresAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN emailVerified BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE;
